name: kbridge-four-bar-animate
description: Second mechanism through the animate pipeline: Inventor four-bar STEP geometry (part-local mm .3dm in KinematicBridge/out/four-bar/bodies/) bound to the bridge-translated .kin.json and animated through CPig's solve. The Sweep node overrides the swept Joint to joint_2 (ShortCrank = the actual crank) because the bridge's inferred driver targets joint_1 (LongCrank = the rocker, whose real toggle limit is ~31 deg); the crank sweeps 0 -> 2.967 rad (170 deg), short of the 180 deg dead-center (B-cand-008). Posed mid-sweep at Step 17/34 (~85 deg). Pass/fail = Converged + SlopSuccess asserts. doc=MM (Custom Preview draws raw canonical-mm geometry; no importer in this graph). CPig-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/four-bar-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A four-bar linkage shown as shaded solid CAD parts (two small house brackets, a short crank, a long crank, and a slender connecting rod) posed mid-motion with the short crank rotated about 85 degrees, overlaid with a small CPig frame-triad skeleton. The parts form one connected closed-loop linkage at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Inventor four-bar CAD parts posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve, on the CPig skeleton.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view of the CPig-posed four-bar parts.
